title: Bist
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bist''' were herd animals who were the traditional prey of the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorians]]. The primitive Togorians once hunted the bist and [[etelo]] herds on the plains of [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]]. Later, when Togorian society split between the settled females and the nomadic [[mosgoth]]-riding males, the females began to raise domesticated herds of bist near their settlements.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 4">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}
